text.title: Test as Living Documentation Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Test as Living Documentation output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: test names use camelCase or programming jargon

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: style_guide_url populated with a typed value
ac_to_test_links populated with a typed value
doc_generator populated with a typed value
ac_coverage_pct populated with a typed value
stakeholder_review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
